# Metric taxonomy

## Direct signal measurements
- CSI packet data
- RSSI
- channel
- rate
- packet rate

## Derived proxy metrics
- cadence estimate
- step interval estimate
- symmetry proxy
- contact-time proxy
- fatigue drift score

## Inferred motion outputs
- 2D keypoints
- 3D skeleton
- body-model representation
- synthetic front/rear/lateral rendering
